title: drynaria excavata
intro: Drynaria excavata, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or tian ma, is a type of plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in Asia. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and anticoagulant effects. The health benefits of Drynaria excavata include reducing swelling and pain, improving blood circulation, and treating conditions such as rheumatism and sciatica. The herbal preparations of Drynaria excavata typically involve drying the plant and then grinding it into a powder, which can be made into teas, capsules, or ointments for external use.
